events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a residential HVAC-R job where the condenser/heat pump line set has an uninsulated suction line. This is a defect - the suction line should be insulated to prevent condensation and energy loss. This is non-compliant with manufacturer instructions and code requirements.

    "Suction line set is uninsulated, exposing refrigerant vapor line to ambient conditions",
    "Missing suction-line insulation will cause condensation, energy loss, and reduced equipment performance",

  "actions": [
    "Install closed-cell elastomeric foam insulation on the suction line with full coverage from indoor coil to outdoor unit",
    "Seal and tape all insulation joints per manufacturer specifications",
    "Verify insulation wall thickness meets local code and manufacturer minimum requirements before close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "The suction line of a split-system condenser/heat pump must be insulated to prevent condensation, energy loss, and capacity degradation. An uninsulated suction line is a clear installation defect and code/manufacturer non-compliance at rough-complete stage.",
